name: albumwm
description: Scrollable tiling extension for GNOME Shell

scripts.build: tsc && blueprint-compiler batch-compile --minify dist/ui ui ui/*
scripts.postbuild: cp -r schemas metadata.json stylesheet.css LICENSE dist/ && glib-compile-schemas dist/schemas && glib-compile-resources --sourcedir=resources --target=dist/albumwm.gresource resources/albumwm.gresource.xml
scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -f albumwm@0iq.dev.zip && cd dist && zip -9r ../albumwm@0iq.dev.zip .
scripts.install:ext: npm run pack && gnome-extensions install --force albumwm@0iq.dev.zip
